Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms

Class AbstractPPTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms.AbstractPPTest
Direct Known Subclasses:

    • typeCheck

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeCheck(Formula<?> formula, ITypeEnvironment tenv)
      Type-checks the given formula and returns the type environment made of the given type environment and the type environment inferred during type-check.
      Parameters:
      formula - a formula to type-check
      tenv - initial type environment
      Returns:
      augmented type environment

    • parseExpression

      public static Expression parseExpression(String image, FormulaFactory factory)

    • parseType

      public static Type parseType(String image, FormulaFactory factory)

    • addToTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder addToTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeEnv, String typeEnvImage)

    • mTypeEnvironment

      public static ITypeEnvironmentBuilder mTypeEnvironment(String typeEnvImage, FormulaFactory factory)
      Generates the type environment specified by the given string. The string contains pairs of form ident=type separated by semicolons.

      Example of valid parameters are:

      • ""
      • "x=S"
      • "x=S; y=T"
      • "x=S; r=S↔S"

      Parameters:
      typeEnvImage - image of the type environment to generate
      factory - the formula factory to use for building the result
      Returns:
      the type environment described by the given string

    • assertFalseClause

      public static void assertFalseClause(ProverResult result)

    • assertTrueClause

      public static void assertTrueClause(ProverResult result)
